name: Office
description: Office-document tools for capability modules — read, create, inspect, and search .docx files on the filesystem.

tools.name: docx_read
tools.description: Read the plain text content of a .docx file. Returns the extracted text with paragraph breaks preserved.

tools.name: docx_create
tools.description: Create a new .docx document from text content, with a styled title heading and body paragraphs.

tools.name: docx_info
tools.description: Get metadata about a .docx document: paragraph count, word count, and character count.

tools.name: docx_replace
tools.description: Find and replace text in a .docx document. The original file is versioned before overwriting, so the previous content is recoverable. Returns the version number, version path, and last-modified timestamp.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for files by name or path pattern within the restricted root, recursively. Supports glob patterns (e.g. *.txt, report*) and substring matching. Returns matching file names, paths, and sizes.

tools.name: index_build
tools.description: Build a search index over documents in the restricted root. Walks files, extracts text, chunks content, and optionally generates vector embeddings for semantic search. Idempotent — re-running only processes changed files.

tools.name: index_search
tools.description: Search indexed document content using hybrid (vector + keyword) search. Returns relevant chunks from indexed documents, ranked by relevance. Requires the index to have been built first via index_build.
